source_title: Aligning language models to follow instructions
paraphrase_for_prose: Use only the already sourced structural point that OpenAI publicly framed InstructGPT as a move from prompt-coaxed GPT-3 behavior toward instruction following and safer task performance.
blocker_or_caveat: Shell capture returned HTTP 403; no direct quote, exact product-post wording, labeler-process detail, or API-default wording until browser, archive, or alternate local capture exists.

paraphrase_for_prose: OpenAI presented the Model Spec as a behavior specification for models in the OpenAI API and ChatGPT, not as a claim that alignment was solved.
blocker_or_caveat: Use the captured 2024-05-08 artifact only; newer versions are outside this row unless separately sourced.

paraphrase_for_prose: Chapter 6 can describe assistant behavior as a hierarchy of broad objectives, hard rules, and overridable defaults.
blocker_or_caveat: Quote fragment is safe; longer policy wording should remain paraphrased or be separately reviewed.

paraphrase_for_prose: Use this as a compact example of how assistant behavior became an explicit command hierarchy rather than raw continuation.
blocker_or_caveat: Explain that this is the 2024 Model Spec's default ordering; do not generalize to all labs or all later OpenAI specs.

paraphrase_for_prose: GPT-4's system card made launch safety a package of measurement, model changes, product/system interventions, and external engagement.
blocker_or_caveat: Local PDF is ignored heavyweight media but hash-recorded; use source row and snapshot row for provenance.

paraphrase_for_prose: The system card explicitly warned that mitigations were not proof of solved safety and could fail in some cases.
blocker_or_caveat: Do not turn this into an independent evaluation of GPT-4 safety; it is OpenAI's first-party disclosure language.

paraphrase_for_prose: Use as a sourced sign that GPT-4 release preparation included external expert probing across risk areas.
blocker_or_caveat: Do not list red-team examples unless separately extracted with context and quote review.

paraphrase_for_prose: GPT-4o extended the system-card pattern with larger external red-team participation across languages and countries.
blocker_or_caveat: Keep multimodal/audio details brief and LLM-product-relevant in Chapter 6.

paraphrase_for_prose: Use GPT-4o to show that by 2024 OpenAI was pairing system cards with named risk-evaluation frameworks.
blocker_or_caveat: Do not imply the framework proves absence of catastrophic risk; present it as a first-party evaluation structure.

paraphrase_for_prose: Paraphrase that GPT-4o red-team data motivated quantitative evaluations and targeted synthetic data in some cases.
